purpose_context: The #827 charter golden-path epic landed in Tranche 2 (PR #864), but four follow-up issues were intentionally deferred. Until they ship, charter E2E coverage permits null prompt paths, dossier snapshots can self-block status transitions, specify/plan can declare success without committing real mission content, and review gates can fail on environment drift. This mission closes those four gaps as a single stabilization PR before #822 backlog work begins.
purpose_tldr: Close out the #827 epic's immediate follow-up tranche by fixing four mission-blocking defects (#844, #845, #846, #848) so charter E2E and review gates stay reliable.
